_doc: Item Director's authored icon subjects — the durable source the icon pipeline regenerates from (reference PNGs are gitignored intermediates). Keyed by item id. `subject` is the emblem to draw; wearables MUST say 'laid flat, no person' or GMIC draws a character. `substyle` overrides the kind->substyle default. Read by scripts/16_systems_director.py `items icons`.

bassa_stew.subject: a steaming wooden bowl of thick hearty brown stew, a spoon standing upright in the bowl, warm food

brass_baton.subject: a short ornate ceremonial baton of polished golden brass, a single rod with a knob finial

brass_gorget.subject: a curved crescent brass neck-collar plate lying flat on a table, a single curved golden brass band, armor piece product photo, no person, no body, no head

bronze_valve.subject: a bronze pipe valve handwheel, a round three-spoke wheel with verdigris and bronze patina, no person

cooling_draught.subject: a tall glass potion bottle filled with bright icy cyan-blue liquid, frost on the glass, cork stopper, a single blue potion, no pink, no red

coursework_spanner.subject: an adjustable wrench spanner tool of grey steel, a single hand tool

founders_locket.subject: an oval golden brass locket pendant on a fine chain, engraved with a small profile portrait

gatewright_coat.subject: a long waxed oilcloth raincoat garment laid flat, dark tan canvas with brass buttons, a coat with no person wearing it

gear_charm.subject: a single small polished brass gear cog threaded on a leather cord, one golden gearwheel

laurel_charm.subject: a laurel wreath emblem, a small round ring of green olive leaves, a leafy medallion charm on white, a single object, no food, no plate, no bowl

pressure_hammer.subject: a heavy riveting hammer, a steel hammer head on a wooden handle, a single tool

spun_sugar.subject: a swirl of pink spun-sugar cotton candy on a paper stick, fluffy pink sweet

verdigris_ring.subject: a finger ring, a single round green verdigris copper band, a circular metal jewelry ring on white, product photo, no gem, no mushroom, no food

weaver_mantle.subject: a folded deep-red cloak cape lying flat on a table, a shoulder mantle of draped fabric with a brass-thread hem, clothing product photo, no person, no body, no head, no mannequin

weirsteel_plate.subject: a steel breastplate cuirass lying flat on a table, a single curved riveted grey metal chest armor plate, product photo, no person, no body, no weapon, no sword
